/etc/bind/zones/db.example.com.current.content:
; example.com zone, post-migration snapshot
example.com.        3600    IN      NS      ns1.example.com.
example.com.        3600    IN      NS      ns2.example.com.
app.example.com.    3600    IN      A       93.184.216.99
api.example.com.    300     IN      A       93.184.216.41
www.example.com.    300     IN      CNAME   app.example.com.

/var/log/change/app-cutover.log.content:
Migration runbook for app.example.com IP swap
---------------------------------------------
DONE     1. Announce maintenance window in #ops
SKIPPED  2. Lower TTL on app.example.com A record from 3600 to 60 at least 24h ahead
DONE     3. Cut over A record from 93.184.216.34 to 93.184.216.99
DONE     4. Verify origin server health on the new IP
PENDING  5. Raise TTL back to 3600 once propagation is confirmed
